text.title: Frontline Validation Protocol Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the frontline-validation-protocol methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale and is referenced from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Step 1 (plan): Build validation matrix (variant × operator × method); secure access agreement.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the plan gate.

rule.statement: Step 2 (shadow and observe): Run shadowing/gemba per slot; capture observation log with closed taxonomy.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the shadow and observe gate.

rule.statement: Step 3 (listening session): Run structured listening session AFTER observation, same operator; non-leading questions.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the listening session gate.

rule.statement: Step 4 (triangulate): Cluster workarounds; identify variants with insufficient coverage; loop back if needed.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the triangulate gate.

rule.statement: Step 5 (reconcile): Produce reconciled_as_is with observed_divergences; sponsor accepts/rejects each with reason.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the reconcile gate.

rule.statement: When default, do: Sequence observation before listening session per same-operator pairing.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: When operator_roles >= 1 AND duration_weeks >= 4 AND access_granted == true, do: Run full protocol: ≥2 operators × variant, observation-before-interview, closed taxonomy.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: If preconditions for frontline-validation-protocol do not hold, do not apply this methodology; route to an alternative as the decision tree suggests.
rule.rationale: Methodologies misapplied to wrong contexts create overhead without value; explicit skip preserves the agent's budget.
